info.title: UltraNote Lite — Agent Capture
info.description: Create notes, ideas, person dossiers, research-paper summaries, notebook pages, tasks, links, or projects directly in UltraNote Lite from an external tool (a ChatGPT Custom GPT Action, a Chrome extension skill, etc.), without copy-pasting the result back in manually. Create-only: every call adds exactly one brand-new record and can never edit or delete anything that already exists.

servers.description: Replace with your own Tailscale Funnel (or other public HTTPS) hostname for this app. Do not use a bare LAN/tailnet IP here if this schema will be used by a service that isn't on your tailnet (e.g. ChatGPT's servers) — it must be a URL those servers can actually reach.

post.summary: Create a new note/idea/person/paper/page/task/link/project in UltraNote Lite.

parameters.name: X-Requested-With
parameters.description: Must always be the literal string "XMLHttpRequest" — a same-origin proof required by the server on every state-changing API call.

kind.description: note/idea/paper: plain note (paper auto-tags 'paper'). person: filed into the 'People' notebook, title auto-extracted from a leading '# Name' line in content if title is omitted. page: filed into an arbitrary notebook (notebook or notebookId required). task/link/project: same shape the app itself uses.

title.description: Required for task/link/project. For note/idea/person/paper/page, optional if content starts with a '# Heading' line.

content.description: Markdown body — used for note/idea/person/paper/page kinds.

notebook.description: Notebook name (case-insensitive), e.g. "People" or "Research". Alternative to notebookId.

value.title: Try flow-matching for the perception loop

value.content:
# Jane Researcher

**Role:** Professor
**Affiliation:** MIT

## Currently working on
- ...

value.title: Attention Is All You Need — summary
Follow up with Jane about the dataset

400.description: Invalid request (missing required field for the given kind).
